case_title: KASTIL MELISSA VS RESTAURO REYNALDO A

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RESTAURO REYNALDO A
